rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §21.403, which governs teacher minimum salary schedule placement. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A teacher, librarian, school counselor, or nurse shall advance one step on the minimum salary schedule under Section 21.402 for each year of experience as a teacher, librarian, school counselor, or nurse until step 20 is reached.
_note: No conflict; rule concerns educator salary steps, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
